data.content: 1. src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts and src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-coverage.test.ts still assert that queued parents are absent from in_action results, which contradicts the required behavior. 2. src/lib/__tests__/bd-coverage.test.ts still covers only direct phase-alias filtering for in_action and lacks ancestor-reinclusion assertions. 3. src/lib/__tests__/backend-factory-auto.test.ts has no active-view routing regression covering the .beads auto/CLI path. 4. Sanity gates checked during review: targeted backend tests passed, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed, bun run lint returned warnings only.
